response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Conservative sharing policy prohibits transfers when requestor SoC (0.10) is below your minimum threshold (0.50), and neighborhood deadlock conditions make peer transfers counterproductive—escalate to dr_aggregator instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
